title: Ward Watch
description: Security-themed protection mod for Fabric 1.21.11 with password-protected storage, doors and more to come.
body:
# Ward & Watch

Ward & Watch is a security-focused Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11.

This project is inspired by classic password-protection Security Craft gameplay, but it is being built as its own original mod for Fabric with its own code, assets, and progression.

## Current Features

### Password Protector
Craft a `Password Protector` and use it to secure supported storage blocks with a numeric password.

### Protected Storage
You can currently protect:
- Chests
- Furnaces
- Blast Furnaces
- Smokers

Once protected:
- Players must enter the correct password to access the block
- Only the creator can break the protected block
- When the owner breaks it, the `Password Protector` is returned
- Protected chests use custom textures

### Protected Door
Ward & Watch also includes a separate `Protected Door` block. This is an own craftable door designed to work with the password system.

Protected Doors:
- Require a `Password Protector` in their recipe
- Ask for a password on first setup
- Open only after entering the correct code
- Close automatically after about 3 seconds
- Cannot be opened by redstone
- Can only be broken by their owner once protected

## Interface
The mod includes:
- A password setup screen
- A keypad-style unlock screen
- Masked password input
- English and Spanish localization

![Interactive GUI for the password setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/873626e590326bd42f8bed1d8abdd205cf9832c7_0.webp)

## Status
Ward & Watch is currently in alpha.

The current focus is building a solid base for security-style gameplay on Fabric 1.21.11. More protected blocks, visual improvements, and new security mechanics are planned for future updates.
